title: Google Just Open-Sourced Its Secret Weapon
narration: Google just dropped Gemma 3, its most capable open-source model yet. It runs on a single GPU, beats GPT-4o on key benchmarks, and anyone can download it right now. The era of local AI just got a serious upgrade.

shots.prompt: Google DeepMind logo on a sleek dark surface, soft studio light reflecting off polished metal
A neural network visualization with glowing connections, data flowing between nodes, deep blue tones
A developer's hands typing on a laptop, terminal window open, code running in real-time
Abstract benchmark chart bars rising sharply, clean white background, minimalist infographic style
